scripts.bundle:android: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output dist/index.android.bundle --assets-dest dist
scripts.bundle:ios: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && react-native bundle --platform ios --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output dist/index.ios.bundle --assets-dest dist
